name: webside-transport-dispatch
description: Static multi-page site with Vercel serverless APIs for transport dispatch management.

scripts.build:preview: npm run pull:preview && npx vercel build
scripts.build:prod: npm run pull:prod && npx vercel build --prod
scripts.deploy:preview: npm run build:preview && npx vercel deploy --prebuilt
scripts.deploy:prod: npm run build:prod && npx vercel deploy --prebuilt --prod
scripts.start: node -e "console.error('No standalone production server is defined for this project. Use npm run dev for the local helper server or npm run dev:vercel to emulate Vercel.'); process.exit(1)"
